Protocol Flow

HOW EVENT HORIZON
WORKS

01
🔐
Connect Wallet

Link your Quai wallet. No sign-up, no KYC — your wallet is your identity on-chain.

02
📝
Create Proposal

Define an event or initiative. Set options, voting period, quorum, and deploy as a smart contract.

03
🗳️
Community Votes

Verified wallet holders vote on proposals. One wallet = one vote. Fully Sybil-resistant.

04
⛏️
PoW Confirmed

Votes are finalized via Quai's Proof-of-Work. Immutable, censorship-resistant, verifiable.

05
🏆
Results On-Chain

Outcomes are public and auditable forever via Quaiscan. Zero trust required.

On-Chain Activity
